_comment: RBI & Basel III regulatory thresholds for Indian banks (as of 2024). direction='min' means value must be ABOVE threshold. direction='max' means value must be BELOW.

car_ratio.description: Capital Adequacy Ratio — RBI mandated minimum 11.5% (incl. CCB)

cet1_ratio.description: Common Equity Tier 1 — RBI minimum 8.0% (incl. 2.5% CCB)

nsfr_ratio.description: Net Stable Funding Ratio — RBI minimum 100%

gnpa_ratio.description: Gross NPA % — internal alert at >5%, escalation at >7%

net_npa_ratio.description: Net NPA % — internal alert at >2%, escalation at >3%

pcr_ratio.description: Provision Coverage Ratio — RBI guideline minimum 70%
